script:
[HOOK 0-2s]
Your coffee after 2 PM is stealing tomorrow's energy.

[PROBLEM 2-8s]
You drink it to survive the afternoon.
But caffeine has a half-life of 6 hours.
That 3 PM coffee? Half of it is still in your brain at 9 PM.

[TIP 8-22s]
Move your last coffee to before 1 PM.
It feels wrong for 3 days. Then your afternoons change.

[CTA 22-28s]
VOLT Sleep gives you 1 action per day to fix this. Free. Link in bio.
caption: ** Your afternoon coffee is borrowing energy from tomorrow. When's your last cup?

script:
[HOOK 0-2s]
Your 3 PM crash is not about food.

[PROBLEM 2-8s]
You ate a normal lunch. You slept okay.
So why are you dead by 3?

[REFRAME 8-18s]
Your biological alertness dips 7-9 hours after waking.
It's a circadian signal, not a fuel problem.

[TIP 18-25s]
10 minutes of bright light around noon. Walk outside. Look up.
It resets the dip.

[CTA 25-30s]
Link in bio — free energy profile in 30 seconds.
caption: ** The real reason you crash at 3 PM isn't what you think. What time do you usually crash?

script:
[HOOK 0-2s]
I tracked my energy for 7 days. The pattern was obvious.

[PROBLEM 2-8s]
I always thought my energy was random.
Good days, bad days, no rhyme or reason.

[REFRAME 8-18s]
After 7 days of logging when I crashed, when I felt sharp,
a clear pattern emerged: same time, every day.

[TIP 18-22s]
Track your energy at 10 AM, 2 PM, and 6 PM for 7 days.
You'll see it too.

[CTA 22-28s]
I built an app that does this for you. 30 seconds to start. Free.
caption: ** I found my energy pattern in 7 days. It changed everything. Ready to find yours?
